reply:
[[BLOCK:srt_25]]
Speaker 1: Of course.

[[BLOCK:srt_26]]
Speaker 1: Golden Gate University continually updates its curriculum to reflect students’ real-world needs, ensuring they receive a practical, career-focused education grounded in real-world experience.

[[BLOCK:srt_27]]
Speaker 1: Most of our faculty come straight from industry and bring extensive hands-on experience into the classroom.

[[BLOCK:srt_28]]
Speaker 1: They remain active at the forefront of their fields, teaching what they practice every day and connecting students with industry resources in San Francisco and around the world.

[[BLOCK:srt_29]]
Speaker 1: In short, our model brings together experienced professionals who both practice and teach, giving students access to the most current and relevant knowledge available.

[[BLOCK:srt_30]]
Speaker 2: I would add that a defining feature of our education is the mindset we foster: pursuing business success while creating value for society. We want students not only to use their skills to advance their own careers, but also to make a positive impact on the communities they serve.

[[BLOCK:srt_31]]
Speaker 3: I see. In your view, compared with other American universities—especially in terms of career focus and industry connections in the Bay Area—what is Golden Gate University’s greatest advantage?

[[BLOCK:srt_32]]
Speaker 1: We’ve touched on some of this already. What truly sets us apart is that we design our programs around students’ immediate needs and offer them in flexible formats that fit into their lives. At the same time, we connect students directly with industry leaders—often as their instructors—as well as through internships and the extensive professional networks across the Bay Area.

[[BLOCK:srt_33]]
Speaker 2: As the president mentioned, many of our faculty members are working professionals.

[[BLOCK:srt_34]]
Speaker 2: They bring the latest insights from their daily work directly into the classroom.

[[BLOCK:srt_35]]
Speaker 2: This is especially important in fields like artificial intelligence, which evolve almost month by month.

[[BLOCK:srt_36]]
Speaker 2: That’s why we continuously update our curriculum to keep pace with industry developments.
